feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP Security
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP Security Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Information about who/when was an integration artefact undeployed
entry.content:
Hello community,

does someone of you know how to get the information about
- who undeployed a specific integration artefact
- when has an integration artefact been undeployed?

I would assume this information will be stored in some log file because of security and consistency reasons.
I already checked the system logs (http log and trace log) and the APIs for Cloud Integration. So far I couldn't find a place to get this information.

Would appreciate any idea where I could do have a look into.

entry.title: Decimal Validation Error in SAP CAP Application After Updating to Latest Dependencies
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm facing an issue in my SAP CAP (Cloud Application Programming) application after updating to the latest versions of dependencies. Previously, everything worked smoothly, but now I am encountering validation errors for decimal fields in my UI5 frontend.

Error Details:

When entering values in fields like "Capacity [m³/h]", "Delivery Head [m]", "Pressure [bar]", and "Fluid Temperature [°C]", I get errors stating that values in scientific notation (e.g., 2.3e+3 or 1.45e+2) are "not a valid Decimal".
I have attached screenshots showing the validation errors in the application and the list of the updated dependency versions for reference.

Steps Taken:

I updated several dependencies, including @Pr_Si/cds, @Pr_Si/ui5-cli, and others, as shown in the attached screenshot.
After the updates, the error started appearing in fields that previously accepted decimal inputs in scientific notation.                                                                                   

Has anyone else encountered this issue after updating to newer versions of SAP CAP or UI5 dependencies? Any guidance on what might be causing this decimal validation error and how to fix it would be highly appreciated.

entry.title: How to bypass the login page and directly proceed to the required page using access_token with Auth2
entry.content:
hi,
Is it possible to skip the auth login page and directly navigate to my custom login page? if yes plz tell me.

the current process is

myApp=>authO Login page=>social web site login page=> Back to my App (if successful login page)

I want to skip the auth login page.
hi, I am an SAP BTP developer and I added Xsuaa security to my application. and also use CIS identity provider.
so my question is when I share or deploy my fullstack application and end-user use that application the CIS provides its login page. I have my login page in my application too.
so how I can authorize the users who are available in my database and access that Auth2 Token so I can bypass that identity provider’s login page and authenticate users with my login page?

entry.title: SAP Cloud Identity Services and SAP ALM for business users
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM ; SAP Cloud Identity Services ; 

Dear SAP Community, 

I am working on getting more details and understanding of capabilities of SAP Cloud Identity Services through implementing cases focused on the integration of SAP Cloud Identity Services with local or customer identity providers, such as AD, ADFS, or local LDAP.

Currently, I would like to set the connection to SAP ALM for users who belong to a local identity provider (business users). We have many people who would like to work in ALM but I don't want to create manually the account for each user. The best is the user can login in ALM with the password of local identity provider and if the user belongs to the specific group in local Idp, then it should get a basic rights in ALM tenant. Specifically and most interesting, I am aiming to configure a scenario where users can log in to SAP ALM using their local identity provider passwords. From my understanding, there are three possible approaches:

  1. User provisioning operates in real-time, creating users upon their first connection to ALM. However, it appears that there is no target application related to ALM within IPS documentation.

  2. User provisioning operates in real-time, where the user is first created in IAS, with provisioning configured so that both source and target are set as IAS. A specific group can then be assigned to the user in IAS based on their group membership in the local identity provider. Using AD as a source in IPS is not good for us because we don't want to synch all AD users with IAS. *but may be we can use group as a filter to restrict the user list, however, AD as a source in IPS should be the last option if nothing else is available.

  3. Using the shadow user feature within the ALM tenant.

Questions:

  1. I have not found any documentation on configuring a scenario where a user can login to a BTP application using the login and password from a local identity provider. Is there guidance on this setup?

  2. Which of the three integrations above do you think would be the most effective for this task?

Thank you in advance for your feedback.

entry.title: BTP Platform Roles
entry.content:
Hello,

How to assign BTP Platform role (subaccount Viewer or destination administrator) to user via IAS as we cannot do role mapping in Trust configuration for Custom Platform identity Provider.

entry.title: BTP Platform roles and CTM
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have 2 different questions :

1. How to assign BTP Platform role (subaccount Viewer or destination administrator) to user via IAS as we cannot do role mapping in Trust configuration for Custom Platform identity Provider. do we already have a solution for this ? or its manually ? 

2. Is it possible to import custom role collection via Cloud transport Management ?

entry.title: Is it possible to get a list of users in SAP BTP?
entry.content:
Hello,

in SAP BTP I use Cloud Identity Services, which has been integrated with AD via Identity Providers. In BTP, in the Security->Users after a successful login, a user is created as a shadow user. Is it possible to use some API to get a list of shadow users? Or get a list of users directly from AD?

Thank you for any help

entry.title: I want to fix the IP address of BTP.
entry.content:
We are calling an external SaaS from a BTP application (Cloud Foundry).
The external SaaS needs to be IP address restricted.
So we want to fix the IP address of BTP.
Is there a way to do this?

Best regards.

entry.title: Calling Secured iFlow from SAPUI5
entry.content: Can somebody explain how can I call the Integration Flow SECURED Endpoint from SAP UI5? To call it in Postman, I first fetch the acess_token with token endpoint then request the json resource with that token. How do I implement it with SAP UI5, so the token of the currently logged in users is user? Also how make the SAP UI5 get the token when user logins? I implemented this scenario 100 time in Angluar and React with custom backend scenarios. There is literally 0 documentation on how to do this in the SAP environment.

entry.title: Issue Accessing SAP BTP Cockpit and Configuring ABAP Cloud Project in Eclipse
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm currently facing an issue while trying to access the SAP BTP Cockpit and configure my environment in Eclipse for the course "Learning the Basics of ABAP on SAP BTP". Here are the details:

When I log in to SAP BTP Cockpit, it shows:
"Logged in as x@email.com. We couldn't find any global accounts associated with your user. If you believe this is a mistake, contact your cloud operator."

A few days ago, everything was working fine. I could access the Cockpit and use it for the course setup.

I've noticed that:

The link https://account.hana.ondemand.com/cockpit/#/home/allaccounts works for me.
However, sometimes it redirects me to https://cockpit.eu20.hana.ondemand.com/, which doesn’t work and shows the error mentioned above.


I managed to access the Cockpit through the working link and copied the JSON key from the instance to create a new ABAP Cloud project in Eclipse. However, when trying to connect in Eclipse, I get the error:
"Failed to get service instance URL info for https://23bf02f0-9d4d-4fe7-ae57-cab54ffafb1e.abap.us10.hana.ondemand.com: Unexpected response code: 503"

Could anyone guide me on:

Why the SAP BTP Cockpit redirects to a non-functional link and how to fix it?
How to resolve the issue in Eclipse to proceed with my ABAP setup in order to continue with the SAP course?
Any help would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

Juan

entry.title: Issue while accessing the Ariba application in BTP workzone
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have exposed the Ariba application from on-Prem to BTP workzone, While trying to access the Ariba application inside the BTP work zone we are getting the below error, but while accessing the url outside the BTP workzone it is working correctly. Please let me know if further details needed.

Any suggestions will be helpful to deal with this issue in BTP workzone.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Is the side-by-side BTP training updated with new course content? Found some bugs
entry.content:
Looks like this course contents are updated with different business example.

from risk-management -> incident-management. Unfortunately, we cannot copy code to test by ourselves and demo exercises are not clearly defined. There are few more bugs in the new content.

How to copy code?

Is it announced anywhere that SAP BTP is going to update the course content?

Please guide on this. Thanks.

Ref: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/build-side-by-side-extensions-on-sap-btp

entry.title: Need information on migrating from SAML protocol to OIDC
entry.content:
Hi,

Could anyone provide the information on the below that would be helpful.

We are planning to migrate the Trust configuration between the SAP BTP account and Cloud Identity services from SAML to OIDC.

If we migrate does the new change will have effect on the current XSUAA service being utilized in developing the SAP BTP UI5 and CAPM Apps.

entry.title: How to automate SAP BTP Platform User management?
entry.content:
With a mindset to automate repeated tasks, I'm exploring on how we can automate User Management on SAP BTP at all current possible levels such as 

- Global Account

     - Subaccount

         - Cloud Foundry

         - Kyma

         - ABAP

I currently reviewed below API's

- https://api.sap.com/api/AuthorizationAPI

- https://api.sap.com/api/PlatformAPI

and BTP , CF CLI services.

While CLI gives us flexibility of User management, we need the client to be installed [local, cloud] to execute the tasks.

I'm seeking inputs on if we have a way to build and deploy a central user management tool on BTP that can give us a runtime to execute BTP , CF  commands thereby manage User management from a UI service through CAPM.

Best Regards,

Sunil Chintalapati

entry.title: for 1) Client Credentials Flow - could you please share code snippet @Ivan-Mirisola
entry.content: Could you please share the code snippet for case 1 - https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/technical-user-to-access-api-of-cap-application-on-btp/qaq-p/13652813

entry.title: Identity Provisioning not creating users after a read/sync no errors
entry.content:
So I'm trying to replicate SAP ECC Business Suite users to SAP Workzone Standard on BTP and have walked through a number of blogs and SAP Help documents to get everything setup.  When I run the job on the SAP Cloud Identity Services provisioning ECC source I see the users coming over and getting processed.  The results are mostly updated/created/read with a few errors which are expected, given the source is a development system with missing emails and other data for some users.

Now, the issue is that NO USERS/GROUPS are created in my custom identity provider as expected and there are no errors or logs that would help explain why they weren’t.  Without any specific errors I have no thread to pull on to try and get down to the root cause.

I’ve included some configuration screenshots for reference, which was gathered from the SAP Help documentation.  Transformations were left untouched which I believe is an important point.

Finally, for simplicity I have added a filter to bring in a single user from the source so that tests can be more quickly iterated; the results are below.

 


Source Configuration:

entry.title: Error auto cert refresh failed with response code 503 when creating connection by cloud connector
entry.content:
Hi I'm very new at SAP BTP today after creating connection by cloud connector I find error message "auto cert refresh failed with response code 503" is appeared on the screen. This error is totally new for me. After search on the net or ask for chat GPT. I can't fiind good answer. I hope somebody giving me the adice.

Thanks.

T.N

entry.title: BTP Trialの構築について
entry.content:
BTP Trialは複数環境持てますか？

同じSAP Universal IDに紐づいているどのSユーザーIDまたはPユーザーIDでサインインしても同じTrial環境に入りますか。または、SユーザーIDまたはPユーザーID毎に異なるBTP Trial環境にすることはできますか。

※ダメだった場合に、試してから規約違反と言われてペナルティを食らいたくないので念のため質問します。

通常であれば、グローバルアカウント間の移送を試す場合、他のメンバーが持つBTP Trial環境か、有償BTP環境とつなぐことになるかと思いますが、Trial to TrialでCTMを使用した移送は可能でしょうか。

entry.title: How to setup BAS in BTP for productive systemS
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I found some blogs for BAS setup for trial account.
Do correct me ,in case I am mistaken, trial account uses some boosters.
My requriement is to setup BAS for productive scenario for my project.

followed this blog: 
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/set-up-bas..html

Regards,

Aditya

entry.title: SFTP Integrations and APIs error
entry.content: Hi today I'm stucked with STTP connector I want to save out put of the Integration suite to the local Pc as On premise. I set the local 192.168.1.3 port 21 and virtual virtualtest.com and port 451 after cheching that port is not used Further I set location Id as SFTP2024. Every thing is set same as instruction but I get attached error. Is this a problem for internal side like a fire wall? If so how can i set the address in white list? Please give me some advice.
